candidate_findings.claim: Scene A describes the yard with standing water and wet flagstones, while Scene B describes it as having dry stones.

evidence_spans.span_text: the yard was standing water by the time Rawn crossed it. ... boots leaving tracks across the flagstones.
The afternoon light was hard and clear, the stones already dry underfoot.

candidate_findings.uncertainty_note: The transition between scenes may have occurred off-page or within a short span of time not covered in detail by Scene A.
candidate_findings.review_note: Verify if any transitional narrative outside these scenes explains the yard's condition change.

overall_run_note: A descriptive mismatch was identified regarding the yard's condition transitioning from wet to dry between scenes.
